mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (content, user_num, target_type, target_id, created_at) VALUES (#{content}, #{userNum}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.content, c.user_num AS userNum, u.nickname AS nickname, c.target_type AS targetType, c.target_id AS targetId, c.created_at AS createdAt FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_num = u.user_num WHERE c.target_type = #{targetType} AND c.target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
